flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Puerto Rico-Mayaguez fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Puerto Rico-Mayaguez rose 83% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 6.6%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Puerto Rico-Mayaguez are 60% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($49.0k vs $30.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Puerto Rico-Mayaguez rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 (11.0k → 12.5k).
